name: bentoml
explanation: BentoML serves Prometheus metrics on the model server's HTTP port (default 3000) at the canonical /metrics path. The spec uses template: instances/openmetrics with example openmetrics_endpoint http://localhost:3000/metrics, and the check class inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2. No credentials are required. The check additionally probes a few model-server health endpoints under the same base URL, but those derive from the openmetrics_endpoint host:port - they are not separate inputs. Single canonical OpenMetrics port + path makes this a textbook generic openmetrics-port-scan candidate.
notes: Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port). Default port 3000 is the BentoML HTTP server's metrics port.
